description: The ValueReceiver component is used in UIX elements to allow dropping a value property into a Button or interactable UIX section to change a value field to the dropped value.

fields.Field: The field to drop the value into.
fields.Undoable: Whether dropping the value is undo able.
fields.TryConvertValues: Tries to change a dropped value which is possibly a string into the proper format by parsing.

usage: Attach to a UIX element to allow an interactable to have droppable values into a target value field. Needs to be provided a target ``Field`` in order for it to work.
